item.title: Cytoscape.js
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Graph theory (network) library for visualisation and analysis.

item.title: Refactoring Guru
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website Provides high-level and implementation guides for common design patterns and refactoring.

item.title: Dopely
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website A bunch of helpful colour tools like pallet, tone, tint and shade generators. Also has digital colour tools for checking contrast and colour blindcheckers.

item.title: npm - SES
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Website SES is hardened JavaScript. SES stands for fearless cooperation. This package is a SES shim for JavaScript features proposed to ECMA TC39.
